name: Seafood Locicero
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ginger-pepper sauce by reducing demi-glace (or broth) by half.
2. In a separate pan, sauté peppers and ginger with brown sugar until mostly dry.
3. Unglaze with Marsala wine and reduce until almost all liquid is gone. Add the remaining broth and reduce by half.
4. Add soy sauce and lemon juice to the sauce.
5. Prepare the kiwi puree by peeling and chopping kiwis, cooking them with sugar over low heat until starting to break down. Deglaze with white wine, reduce, add water, and purée.
6. Cook pasta pancakes: Boil cappellini until just done, drain, and mix with eggs, Parmesan cheese, bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and green onion in a bowl. Form into 4 wedges and freeze until firm.
7. Before serving, saute the pancake wedges until golden brown on one side, then flip and bake at 350°F for 5 minutes.
8. Marinate scallops and shrimp with half white wine and lemon juice for about an hour before cooking.
9. Poach mussels and clams in white wine until done.
10. Grill or saute the shrimp and scallops until cooked through.
11. Serve by covering half of each plate with 2 oz ginger-pepper sauce, garnished with a pasta pancake.
